```text
    15→}
    16→
    17→const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000
    18→
    19→// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────
    20→
    21→const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
    22→  dismiss: () => void
    23→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    24→  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
    25→  initialSnapshot: string
    26→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    27→  onSave: (ref: string) => void
    28→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
    29→  onClose: (doc?: Record<string, any>) => void
    30→}> = ({
    31→  dismiss,
    32→  TldrawComponent,
    33→  initialData,
    34→  initialSnapshot,
    35→  theme,
    36→  onSave,
    37→  saveSnapshot,
    38→  onClose,
    39→}) => {
    40→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
    41→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
    42→  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    43→  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
    44→  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
    45→  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote'>(() => {
    46→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim())
    47→      return 'inline'
    48→    try {
    49→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    50→      return 'inline'
    51→    } catch {
    52→      return 'remote'
    53→    }
    54→  })
    55→  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
    56→  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    57→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return ''
    58→    try {
    59→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    60→      return ''
    61→    } catch {
    62→      return initialSnapshot
    63→    }
    64→  })
    65→  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
    66→
    67→  useEffect(() => {
    68→    return () => {
    69→      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    70→    }
    71→  }, [])
    72→
    73→  const performSave = useCallback((): Promise<void> => {
    74→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    75→    const editor = editorRef.current
    76→    if (!editor) return Promise.resolve()
    77→    try {
    78→      const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
    79→      if (storageModeRef.current === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
    80→        setIsSaving(true)
    81→        return saveSnapshot(doc).then(
    82→          (ref) => {
    83→            onSave(ref)
    84→            isDirtyRef.current = false
    85→            setIsDirty(false)
    86→            setIsSaving(false)
    87→            setSavedRef(ref)
    88→          },
    89→          () => {
    90→            setIsSaving(false)
    91→          },
    92→        )
    93→      } else {
    94→        onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
    95→        isDirtyRef.current = false
    96→        setIsDirty(false)
    97→      }
    98→    } catch {
    99→      // ignore
   100→    }
   101→    return Promise.resolve()
   102→  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot])
   103→
   104→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   105→    (editor: any) => {
   106→      editorRef.current = editor
   107→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   108→      editor.store.listen(
   109→        () => {
   110→          isDirtyRef.current = true
   111→          setIsDirty(true)
   112→          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   113→          saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(
   114→            () => performSave(),
   115→            SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS,
   116→          )
   117→        },
   118→        { scope: 'document' },
   119→      )
   120→    },
   121→    [theme, performSave],
   122→  )
   123→
   124→  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
   125→    void performSave().then(() => {
   126→      const editor = editorRef.current
   127→      onClose(editor?.store.getSnapshot())
   128→      dismiss()
   129→    })
   130→  }, [performSave, onClose, dismiss])
   131→
   132→  const handleDiscard = useCallback(() => {
   133→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   134→    dismiss()
   135→  }, [dismiss])
   136→
   137→  const showConfirmDialog = useCallback(() => {
   138→    presentDialog({
   139→      title: 'Unsaved Changes',
   140→      description:
   141→        'You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.',
   142→      content: ({ dismiss: dismissConfirm }) => (
   143→        <div className={css.tldrawConfirmActions}>
   144→          <button
   145→            type="button"
   146→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtn}
   147→            onClick={dismissConfirm}
   148→          >
   149→            Continue Editing
   150→          </button>
   151→          <button
   152→            type="button"
   153→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnDanger}
   154→            onClick={() => {
   155→              dismissConfirm()
   156→              handleDiscard()
   157→            }}
   158→          >
   159→            Discard
   160→          </button>
   161→          <button
   162→            type="button"
   163→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnPrimary}
   164→            onClick={() => {
   165→              dismissConfirm()
   166→              handleSaveAndClose()
   167→            }}
   168→          >
   169→            Save & Close
   170→          </button>
   171→        </div>
   172→      ),
   173→      portalClassName,
   174→      theme,
   175→      showCloseButton: false,
   176→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   177→    })
   178→  }, [handleDiscard, handleSaveAndClose, portalClassName, theme])
   179→
   180→  // Intercept ESC in capture phase to prevent Base UI auto-dismiss
   181→  useEffect(() => {
   182→    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   183→      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   184→        e.preventDefault()
   185→        e.stopImmediatePropagation()
   186→        if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   187→          showConfirmDialog()
   188→        } else {
   189→          dismiss()
   190→        }
   191→      }
   192→    }
   193→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   194→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   195→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   196→
   197→  const attemptClose = useCallback(() => {
   198→    if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   199→      showConfirmDialog()
   200→    } else {
   201→      dismiss()
   202→    }
   203→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   204→
   205→  const handleManualUpload = useCallback(() => {
   206→    performSave()
   207→  }, [performSave])
   208→
   209→  const handleExportJson = useCallback(() => {
   210→    const editor = editorRef.current
   211→    if (!editor) return
   212→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   213→    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(doc, null, 2)], {
   214→      type: 'application/json',
   215→    })
   216→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   217→    const a = document.createElement('a')
   218→    a.href = url
   219→    a.download = 'tldraw-snapshot.json'
   220→    a.click()
   221→    URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   222→  }, [])
   223→
   224→  const handleCopyJson = useCallback(() => {
   225→    const editor = editorRef.current
   226→    if (!editor) return
   227→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   228→    void navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(doc))
   229→  }, [])
   230→
   231→  const handleCopyRef = useCallback(() => {
   232→    if (savedRef) void navigator.clipboard.writeText(savedRef)
   233→  }, [savedRef])
   234→
   235→  const handleStorageModeChange = useCallback(
   236→    (newMode: 'inline' | 'remote') => {
   237→      setStorageMode(newMode)
   238→      storageModeRef.current = newMode
   239→      if (newMode === 'inline') setSavedRef('')
   240→      performSave()
   241→    },
   242→    [performSave],
   243→  )
   244→
   245→  return (
   246→    <>
   247→      {/* Header */}
   248→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
   249→        <span
   250→          className={css.tldrawStatusDot}
   251→          style={{ backgroundColor: isDirty ? '#f59e0b' : '#22c55e' }}
   252→        />
   253→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Canvas Editor</span>
   254→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
   255→
   256→        <div className={css.tldrawHeaderActions}>
   257→          {saveSnapshot && (
   258→            <>
   259→              <SegmentedControl
   260→                items={[
   261→                  { value: 'inline', label: 'Inline' },
   262→                  { value: 'remote', label: 'Remote' },
   263→                ]}
   264→                value={storageMode}
   265→                onChange={handleStorageModeChange}
   266→              />
   267→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   268→              <button
   269→                type="button"
   270→                className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   271→                onClick={handleManualUpload}
   272→                disabled={isSaving}
   273→              >
   274→                <Upload size={14} />
   275→                <span>{isSaving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}</span>
   276→              </button>
   277→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   278→            </>
   279→          )}
   280→          <button
   281→            type="button"
   282→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   283→            onClick={handleExportJson}
   284→          >
   285→            <Download size={14} />
   286→            JSON
   287→          </button>
   288→          <button
   289→            type="button"
   290→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   291→            onClick={handleCopyJson}
   292→          >
   293→            <Clipboard size={14} />
   294→            Copy
   295→          </button>
   296→          {storageMode === 'remote' && savedRef && (
   297→            <>
   298→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   299→              <button
   300→                type="button"
   301→                className={css.tldrawActionBarUrl}
   302→                onClick={handleCopyRef}
   303→                title={savedRef}
   304→              >
   305→                {savedRef}
   306→              </button>
   307→            </>
   308→          )}
   309→        </div>
   310→
   311→        <button
   312→          type="button"
   313→          className={css.tldrawHeaderClose}
   314→          onClick={attemptClose}
   315→        >
   316→          <X size={18} />
   317→        </button>
   318→      </div>
   319→
   320→      {/* Canvas */}
   321→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
   322→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={initialData} onMount={handleMount} />
   323→      </div>
   324→    </>
   325→  )
   326→}
   327→
   328→// ── Main component ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   329→
   330→export const TldrawEditRenderer: FC<TldrawEditRendererProps> = ({
   331→  snapshot,
   332→  onSnapshotChange,
   333→}) => {
   334→  const theme = useColorScheme()
   335→  const { saveSnapshot } = useTldrawConfig()
   336→  const {
   337→    snapshot: initialData,
   338→    loading: dataLoading,
   339→    error: dataError,
   340→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
   341→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
   342→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
   343→  const previewEditorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   344→  const initialDataRef = useRef<Record<string, any> | undefined>(undefined)
   345→  const onSnapshotChangeRef = useRef(onSnapshotChange)
   346→  onSnapshotChangeRef.current = onSnapshotChange
   347→  const saveSnapshotRef = useRef(saveSnapshot)
   348→  saveSnapshotRef.current = saveSnapshot
   349→  const snapshotRef = useRef(snapshot)
   350→  snapshotRef.current = snapshot
   351→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   352→
   353→  useEffect(() => {
   354→    if (initialData && !initialDataRef.current) {
   355→      initialDataRef.current = initialData
   356→    }
   357→  }, [initialData])
   358→
   359→  useEffect(() => {
   360→    import('tldraw')
   361→      .then((mod) => {
   362→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   363→        setLibLoading(false)
   364→      })
   365→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   366→  }, [])
   367→
   368→  useEffect(() => {
   369→    if (previewEditorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   370→      previewEditorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({
   371→        colorScheme: theme,
   372→      })
   373→    }
   374→  }, [theme])
   375→
   376→  const handlePreviewMount = useCallback(
   377→    (editor: any) => {
   378→      previewEditorRef.current = editor
   379→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   380→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   381→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   382→      setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
   383→    },
   384→    [theme],
   385→  )
   386→
   387→  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
   388→    if (!TldrawComponent) return
   389→    presentDialog({
   390→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   391→        <TldrawEditorDialogContent
   392→          dismiss={dismiss}
   393→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   394→          initialData={initialDataRef.current}
   395→          initialSnapshot={snapshotRef.current}
   396→          theme={theme}
   397→          onSave={(ref) => onSnapshotChangeRef.current(ref)}
   398→          saveSnapshot={saveSnapshotRef.current}
   399→          onClose={(doc) => {
   400→            if (doc) initialDataRef.current = doc
   401→          }}
   402→        />
   403→      ),
   404→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   405→      portalClassName,
   406→      theme,
   407→      showCloseButton: false,
   408→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   409→    })
   410→  }, [TldrawComponent, theme, portalClassName])
   411→
   412→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   413→
   414→  if (loading || !TldrawComponent) {
   415→    return (
   416→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   417→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw editor...</div>
   418→      </div>
   419→    )
   420→  }
   421→
   422→  if (dataError) {
   423→    return (
   424→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   425→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError}</div>
   426→      </div>
   427→    )
   428→  }
   429→
   430→  return (
   431→    <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   432→      <TldrawComponent
   433→        snapshot={initialDataRef.current}
   434→        hideUi
   435→        onMount={handlePreviewMount}
   436→      />
   437→
   438→      <button
   439→        type="button"
   440→        className={css.tldrawEditOverlay}
   441→        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   442→      >
   443→        <span className={css.tldrawEditLabel}>
   444→          <Pencil size={16} />
   445→          Edit Whiteboard
   446→        </span>
   447→      </button>
   448→    </div>
   449→  )
   450→}
   451→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     7→  Spread,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    11→import { createElement } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { TldrawSSRRenderer } from './TldrawSSRRenderer'
    14→
    15→export type SerializedTldrawNode = Spread<
    16→  { snapshot: string },
    17→  SerializedLexicalNode
    18→>
    19→
    20→export class TldrawNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    21→  __snapshot: string
    22→
    23→  static getType(): string {
    24→    return 'tldraw'
    25→  }
    26→
    27→  static clone(node: TldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    28→    return new TldrawNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    32→    super(key)
    33→    this.__snapshot = snapshot
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    37→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    38→    div.className = 'rich-tldraw-wrapper'
    39→    return div
    40→  }
    41→
    42→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    43→    return false
    44→  }
    45→
    46→  isInline(): boolean {
    47→    return false
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    51→    return $createTldrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
    52→  }
    53→
    54→  exportJSON(): SerializedTldrawNode {
    55→    return {
    56→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    57→      type: 'tldraw',
    58→      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    59→      version: 1,
    60→    }
    61→  }
    62→
    63→  getSnapshot(): string {
    64→    return this.__snapshot
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  setSnapshot(snapshot: string): void {
    68→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    69→    writable.__snapshot = snapshot
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    73→    return createElement(TldrawSSRRenderer, {
    74→      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    75→    })
    76→  }
    77→}
    78→
    79→export function $createTldrawNode(snapshot: string): TldrawNode {
    80→  return new TldrawNode(snapshot)
    81→}
    82→
    83→export function $isTldrawNode(
    84→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    85→): node is TldrawNode {
    86→  return node instanceof TldrawNode
    87→}
    88→
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-02 10:18:30Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now I have a comprehensive understanding. Let me compile the analysis.

Key findings:

**tldraw integration scope:**
- 1 package: `@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw` (~10 files)
- Node type: `'tldraw'` with snapshot as JSON string
- Display: lazy-loads `tldraw` package, uses `<Tldraw snapshot={data} hideUi onMount={...} />`
- Edit: full-screen dialog with tldraw editor, auto-save, inline/remote storage
- SSR: placeholder showing shape count
- Data: `editor.store.getSnapshot()` → JSON object with `records` (shape:*, page:*) + `schema`


- API surface: `Tldraw` component, store snapshots and listeners, instance state updates, tool selection, user preferences, and zoom controls

**Excalidraw equivalent mapping:**
- Component: `<Excalidraw />` from `@excalidraw/excalidraw`
- Readonly: `viewModeEnabled={true}` prop
- Theme: `light` or `dark` prop

Now I'm looking at how data flows in Excalidraw—retrieving scene elements, app state, and files through the API, then either passing them as initial data or updating the scene dynamically. Serialization and restoration use dedicated methods, while zoom operations include fitting to content and custom zoom levels, with changes tracked through an `onChange` callback. I'm also comparing bundle sizes between the two libraries.

Excalidraw comes in slightly smaller at 1.2-1.5MB gzipped compared to tldraw's 1.5-2MB, mainly because it has a leaner feature set without the collaboration engine and computed properties system that tldraw includes. The real challenge here is the data format migration—tldraw uses a record-based schema with UUIDs while Excalidraw uses flat arrays of elements with separate app state and files, so converting between them requires a complete restructuring of how the data is organized.

Since there's no existing data to migrate, I can skip that concern and focus on the API differences. The component APIs are quite different: tldraw uses an imperative approach with `onMount` callbacks to access the editor, while Excalidraw relies on props and an API callback pattern. For interactions like zooming and theming, the methods diverge significantly—tldraw exposes direct editor methods while Excalidraw manages these through AppState and API calls.

For persistence, tldraw snapshots the store directly while Excalidraw requires serializing elements and app state separately. CSS-wise, both libraries need their own stylesheets, though Excalidraw has more built-in styling, and I'll need to handle custom overlays for things like zoom controls.

This migration touches about ten files across the tldraw extension and related renderers, plus some headless and kit references. Excalidraw's hand-drawn aesthetic differs from tldraw's polished look, but both handle dark/light modes and readonly states well—Excalidraw actually has stronger static export options for SVG and PNG. I'm still weighing the bundle size implications.

Both libraries are surprisingly comparable in gzip size, with tldraw around 1.5-2MB and Excalidraw slightly lighter at 1.2-1.5MB, so the lazy-loading we already have in place should handle either choice without major impact.
</details></think>

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-02 10:19:15Z)**_

已全面探查 tldraw 在此 monorepo 之集成范围，并调研 excalidraw 之 API 与体积。析之如下。

---

## 一，涉及范围

tldraw 之触点共约 **15 处**:

| 层级 | 文件 | 作用 |
|------|------|------|
| 核心包 | `haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/` (~10文件) | Node, Renderer (display/edit/SSR), Plugin, Config, Hook, Styles, Transformer |
| 聚合-静态 | `rich-renderers/src/tldraw.ts` | re-export static node/renderer |
| 聚合-编辑 | `rich-renderers-edit/src/tldraw.ts` | re-export edit node/renderer/plugin |
| headless | `rich-headless/src/index.ts` | headless decorator `'tldraw'` |
| 集成包 | `rich-kit-shiro/src/index.ts` + `markdown.ts` | re-export + transformer |

## 二，API 对照

| 能力 | tldraw (当前) | excalidraw (替换) |
|------|--------------|-------------------|
| 组件 | `<Tldraw snapshot={data} hideUi onMount={cb} />` | `<Excalidraw initialData={data} viewModeEnabled theme={t} excalidrawAPI={cb} />` |
| 只读 | `editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })` | `viewModeEnabled={true}` prop (更简洁) |
| 主题 | `editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme })` | `theme="light"\|"dark"` prop (更简洁) |
| 获取数据 | `editor.store.getSnapshot()` → `{ records, schema }` | `api.getSceneElements()` + `api.getAppState()` + `api.getFiles()` |
| 监听变更 | `editor.store.listen(cb, { scope: 'document' })` | `onChange` prop |
| 缩放适配 | `editor.zoomToFit()` / `zoomIn()` / `zoomOut()` | `api.scrollToContent()` / `api.zoom()` |
| 序列化 | `JSON.stringify(store.getSnapshot())` | `serializeAsJSON({ elements, appState })` |
| 手动工具 | `editor.setCurrentTool('hand')` | 无需，`viewModeEnabled` 自动禁用工具 |

核心 API 皆有对应，且 excalidraw 之 readonly/theme 以 prop 驱动，较 tldraw 之命令式 API **更契合 React 范式**。

## 三，数据格式差异

```
# tldraw
{ records: { "shape:uuid": {...}, "page:uuid": {...} }, schema: {...} }

# excalidraw  
{ elements: ExcalidrawElement[], appState: AppState, files?: BinaryFiles }
```

格式完全不同。然君言未上线，故**无需迁移旧数据**。仅需改 `SerializedTldrawNode` → `SerializedExcalidrawNode`，`snapshot` 字段存 excalidraw 之 JSON 即可。

## 四，改造复杂度

| 模块 | 复杂度 | 说明 |
|------|--------|------|
| `ExcalidrawNode.ts` (原 TldrawNode) | **低** | 换 type 名，snapshot 字段不变(仍为 JSON string) |
| `ExcalidrawEditNode.ts` | **低** | 同 pattern，换 lazy import |
| `ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer.tsx` | **中** | 改 `import('tldraw')` → `import('@excalidraw/excalidraw')`，换组件 props。zoom 按钮需改用 excalidraw API |
| `ExcalidrawEditRenderer.tsx` | **中高** | 全屏编辑 dialog 逻辑最重。save 改用 `serializeAsJSON`，listen 改 `onChange` prop，store API 全换 |
| `SSRRenderer` | **低** | 只是占位符，改文案即可 |
| `useTldrawData.ts` → `useExcalidrawData.ts` | **低** | JSON parse 逻辑不变，仅产出格式不同 |
| `styles.css.ts` | **低** | CSS class 名重命名，布局逻辑不变 |
| `TldrawPlugin` → `ExcalidrawPlugin` | **低** | 换 command 名和 slash menu 文案 |
| `TldrawConfigContext` → `ExcalidrawConfigContext` | **低** | 接口不变 |
| Transformer | **低** | `<tldraw>` → `<excalidraw>` |
| 外部引用(renderers/kit/headless) | **低** | 纯 re-export，改包名即可 |

**总体复杂度：中等**。主要工作量在 `EditRenderer` (~100行逻辑改写) 和 `DisplayRenderer` (~50行)。其余为机械性重命名。

估 **1-2 天** 可完成全部替换(含调试)。

## 五，包体积对比

| 指标 | tldraw ^4.4.0 | @excalidraw/excalidraw ^0.18.0 |
|------|---------------|-------------------------------|
| npm unpacked | ~46 MB | ~46.8 MB |
| JS bundle (min+gzip) | ~1.5-2 MB | ~1.2-1.5 MB |
| 主要负担 | 内置协作引擎, computed properties, 丰富工具集 | 手绘渲染引擎, 字体资源 |
| tree-shaking | 有限 (SDK 整体打包) | 较好 (ESM, 部分可 tree-shake) |

**excalidraw 约轻 20-30%**。二者皆为重量级，然此处已采 lazy `import()` + Suspense，仅在用户交互时加载，对首屏无影响。

## 六，UI 适配度

| 维度 | tldraw | excalidraw |
|------|--------|------------|
| 视觉风格 | 精致、现代 | 手绘感、素描风 |
| 暗色模式 | 支持 | 支持 (`theme` prop) |
| UI 隐藏 | `hideUi` prop | `UIOptions` 细粒度控制 |
| 只读展示 | 内嵌 canvas，自定义 zoom 按钮 | 同样可行，`viewModeEnabled` |
| 全屏编辑 | dialog modal | 同样可行 |
| 协作 | 内置 | 需额外实现(此处不需) |
| SVG/PNG 导出 | 需手动 | `exportToSvg` / `exportToBlob` 开箱即用 |

excalidraw 之手绘风格与博客 "Shiroi" 之素雅气质**颇为相配**。且其 readonly 模式更易实现(纯 prop)，导出能力更强。

## 七，结论

| 维度 | 判断 |
|------|------|
| 可行性 | **完全可行**，API 一一对应 |
| 复杂度 | **中等**，核心改写 ~150-200 行，机械重命名 ~200 行 |
| 体积 | excalidraw **略优** (轻约 20-30%) |
| UI 适配 | **良好**，手绘风格契合博客调性 |
| API 设计 | excalidraw **更 React-friendly** (props 驱动 vs 命令式) |
| 唯一劣势 | excalidraw 无内置 `snapshot` prop，需以 `initialData` + `onChange` 模式替代 |

若君决意替换，吾可拟定详细实施计划。

Sources:
- [@excalidraw/excalidraw - npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@excalidraw/excalidraw)
- [Excalidraw API Props](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs/@excalidraw/excalidraw/api/props)
- [Excalidraw Utils](https://docs.excalidraw.com/docs/@excalidraw/excalidraw/api/utils)
- [tldraw - npm](https://www.npmjs.com/package/tldraw)
- [Tldraw vs Excalidraw comparison](https://www.oreateai.com/blog/tldraw-vs-excalidraw-finding-your-digital-sketchpad-sweet-spot/60b6daa05d25787c2db0675d5f7d9471)

```typescript
}
```

---

## Summary of Architecture

**Static/Edit Split**:
- **Base**: `TldrawNode` + `TldrawDisplayRenderer` (SSR safe)
- **Edit**: `TldrawEditNode` + `TldrawEditRenderer` (heavy deps: tldraw, dialog UI)
- **Config**: Context provider for API URL + custom save handler

**Data Handling**:
- Inline: JSON snapshot stored directly
- Remote: URL or `ref:id` fetched on demand

**Styling**: 100% Vanilla Extract, all design tokens via `@haklex/rich-style-token`

**Transformers**: Markdown ↔ `<tldraw>snapshot</tldraw>` format

This structure enables complete tree-shaking of the tldraw library from the static renderer build.

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { $insertNodes, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR, createCommand } from 'lexical'
     3→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { $createTldrawEditNode } from './TldrawEditNode'
     6→
     7→export const INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND = createCommand<string>('INSERT_TLDRAW')
     8→
     9→export function TldrawPlugin() {
    10→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    11→
    12→  useEffect(() => {
    13→    return editor.registerCommand(
    14→      INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND,
    15→      (snapshot) => {
    16→        const node = $createTldrawEditNode(snapshot)
    17→        $insertNodes([node])
    18→        return true
    19→      },
    20→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    21→    )
    22→  }, [editor])
    23→
    24→  return null
    25→}
    26→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export interface TldrawConfig {
     5→  apiUrl?: string
     6→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
     7→}
     8→
     9→const TldrawConfigContext = createContext<TldrawConfig>({})
    10→
    11→export function TldrawConfigProvider({
    12→  apiUrl,
    13→  saveSnapshot,
    14→  children,
    15→}: TldrawConfig & { children: ReactNode }) {
    16→  const value = useMemo(
    17→    () => ({ apiUrl, saveSnapshot }),
    18→    [apiUrl, saveSnapshot],
    19→  )
    20→  return (
    21→    <TldrawConfigContext.Provider value={value}>
    22→      {children}
    23→    </TldrawConfigContext.Provider>
    24→  )
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function useTldrawConfig(): TldrawConfig {
    28→  return use(TldrawConfigContext)
    29→}
    30→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { FC } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export interface TldrawSSRRendererProps {
     4→  snapshot: string
     5→}
     6→
     7→export const TldrawSSRRenderer: FC<TldrawSSRRendererProps> = ({ snapshot }) => {
     8→  let label = 'Tldraw Whiteboard'
     9→  try {
    10→    const data = JSON.parse(snapshot)
    11→    if (data && typeof data === 'object') {
    12→      const shapeCount = Object.keys(data).filter((k) =>
    13→        k.startsWith('shape:'),
    14→      ).length
    15→      if (shapeCount > 0) {
    16→        label = `Tldraw Whiteboard (${shapeCount} shapes)`
    17→      }
    18→    }
    19→  } catch {
    20→    // snapshot might be a URL ref or invalid JSON — show generic placeholder
    21→  }
    22→
    23→  return (
    24→    <div
    25→      className="rich-tldraw-ssr-placeholder"
    26→      style={{
    27→        position: 'relative',
    28→        width: '100%',
    29→        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
    30→        display: 'flex',
    31→        alignItems: 'center',
    32→        justifyContent: 'center',
    33→        backgroundColor: 'var(--rich-tldraw-bg, #f5f5f5)',
    34→        borderRadius: '8px',
    35→        border: '1px solid var(--rich-tldraw-border, #e5e5e5)',
    36→        color: 'var(--rich-tldraw-fg, #737373)',
    37→        fontSize: '14px',
    38→      }}
    39→      aria-label={label}
    40→    >
    41→      <span>{label}</span>
    42→    </div>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/useTldrawData.ts`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
     4→
     5→interface TldrawDataState {
     6→  snapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
     7→  loading: boolean
     8→  error: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function useTldrawData(data: string): TldrawDataState {
    12→  const { apiUrl } = useTldrawConfig()
    13→
    14→  const parsed = useMemo(() => {
    15→    if (!data) return { type: 'empty' as const }
    16→
    17→    try {
    18→      const json = JSON.parse(data)
    19→      if (json && typeof json === 'object') {
    20→        return {
    21→          type: 'inline' as const,
    22→          snapshot: json as Record<string, any>,
    23→        }
    24→      }
    25→    } catch {
    26→      // not JSON
    27→    }
    28→
    29→    const firstLine = data.split('\n')[0].trim()
    30→    let fetchUrl: string | undefined
    31→
    32→    if (firstLine.startsWith('http')) {
    33→      fetchUrl = firstLine
    34→    } else if (firstLine.startsWith('ref:') && apiUrl) {
    35→      fetchUrl = `${apiUrl}/objects/${firstLine.slice(4)}`
    36→    }
    37→
    38→    if (fetchUrl) {
    39→      return { type: 'remote' as const, fetchUrl }
    40→    }
    41→
    42→    return {
    43→      type: 'error' as const,
    44→      error: firstLine.startsWith('ref:')
    45→        ? 'Missing apiUrl for ref resolution'
    46→        : 'Unrecognized snapshot format',
    47→    }
    48→  }, [data, apiUrl])
    49→
    50→  const fetchUrl = parsed.type === 'remote' ? parsed.fetchUrl : undefined
    51→
    52→  const [remoteSnapshot, setRemoteSnapshot] = useState<
    53→    Record<string, any> | undefined
    54→  >()
    55→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(!!fetchUrl)
    56→  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    57→
    58→  useEffect(() => {
    59→    if (!fetchUrl) return
    60→
    61→    let cancelled = false
    62→    setLoading(true)
    63→    setError('')
    64→
    65→    fetch(fetchUrl)
    66→      .then((res) => {
    67→        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    68→        return res.json()
    69→      })
    70→      .then((json) => {
    71→        if (!cancelled) {
    72→          setRemoteSnapshot(json)
    73→          setLoading(false)
    74→        }
    75→      })
    76→      .catch((err) => {
    77→        if (!cancelled) {
    78→          setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load')
    79→          setLoading(false)
    80→        }
    81→      })
    82→
    83→    return () => {
    84→      cancelled = true
    85→    }
    86→  }, [fetchUrl])
    87→
    88→  if (parsed.type === 'inline') {
    89→    return { snapshot: parsed.snapshot, loading: false, error: '' }
    90→  }
    91→
    92→  if (parsed.type === 'remote') {
    93→    return { snapshot: remoteSnapshot, loading, error }
    94→  }
    95→
    96→  if (parsed.type === 'error') {
    97→    return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: parsed.error }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: '' }
   101→}
   102→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
    15→]
    16→
    17→export function buildShiroMarkdownTransformers(
    18→  extra: MarkdownTransformer[] = [],
```

```text
     1→/**
     2→ * @haklex/rich-headless
     3→ *
     4→ * Headless-compatible Lexical node registry for server-side parsing.
     5→ * Zero React dependency — only lexical + standard @lexical/* packages.
     6→ *
     7→ * Usage with @lexical/headless:
     8→ *   import { createHeadlessEditor } from '@lexical/headless'
     9→ *   import { allHeadlessNodes } from '@haklex/rich-headless'
    10→ *   const editor = createHeadlessEditor({ nodes: allHeadlessNodes })
    11→ */
    12→
    13→import { CodeHighlightNode, CodeNode } from '@lexical/code'
    14→import { HorizontalRuleNode } from '@lexical/extension'
    15→import { AutoLinkNode, LinkNode } from '@lexical/link'
    16→import { ListItemNode, ListNode } from '@lexical/list'
    17→import { HeadingNode, QuoteNode } from '@lexical/rich-text'
    18→import { TableCellNode, TableNode, TableRowNode } from '@lexical/table'
    19→import {
    20→  DecoratorNode,
    21→  type EditorConfig,
    22→  ElementNode,
    23→  type Klass,
    24→  type LexicalEditor,
    25→  type LexicalNode,
    26→  type NodeKey,
    27→  type SerializedElementNode,
    28→  type SerializedLexicalNode,
    29→} from 'lexical'
    30→
    31→// ── Builtin nodes ──
    32→
    33→export const builtinNodes: Klass<LexicalNode>[] = [
    34→  HeadingNode,
    35→  QuoteNode,
    36→  ListNode,
    37→  ListItemNode,
    38→  LinkNode,
    39→  AutoLinkNode,
    40→  HorizontalRuleNode,
    41→  TableNode,
    42→  TableCellNode,
    43→  TableRowNode,
    44→  CodeNode,
    45→  CodeHighlightNode,
    46→]
    47→
    48→// ── Helpers ──
    49→
    50→function stubDOM(): HTMLElement {
    51→  return document.createElement('span')
    52→}
    53→
    54→function extractText(state: unknown): string {
    55→  if (!state || typeof state !== 'object') return ''
    56→  const root = (state as Record<string, unknown>).root as
    57→    | Record<string, unknown>
    58→    | undefined
    59→  if (!root) return ''
    60→  return walkChildren(root)
    61→}
    62→
    63→function walkChildren(node: Record<string, unknown>): string {
    64→  const children = node.children as Record<string, unknown>[] | undefined
    65→  if (!children) return (node.text as string) ?? ''
    66→  return children.map(walkChildren).join('\n')
    67→}
    68→
    69→// ── SpoilerNode (ElementNode, inline) ──
    70→
    71→export class SpoilerNode extends ElementNode {
    72→  static getType(): string {
    73→    return 'spoiler'
    74→  }
    75→  static clone(node: SpoilerNode): SpoilerNode {
    76→    return new SpoilerNode((node as any).__key)
    77→  }
    78→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
    79→    super(key)
    80→  }
    81→  static importJSON(_json: SerializedElementNode): SpoilerNode {
    82→    return new SpoilerNode()
    83→  }
    84→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode {
    85→    return { ...super.exportJSON(), type: 'spoiler', version: 1 }
    86→  }
    87→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
    88→    return stubDOM()
    89→  }
    90→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    91→    return false
    92→  }
    93→  isInline(): boolean {
    94→    return true
    95→  }
    96→}
    97→
    98→// ── RubyNode (ElementNode, inline) ──
    99→
   100→export class RubyNode extends ElementNode {
   101→  __reading = ''
   102→
   103→  static getType(): string {
   104→    return 'ruby'
   105→  }
   106→  static clone(node: RubyNode): RubyNode {
   107→    const n = new RubyNode((node as any).__key)
   108→    n.__reading = node.__reading
   109→    return n
   110→  }
   111→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   112→    super(key)
   113→  }
   114→  static importJSON(
   115→    json: SerializedElementNode & { reading?: string },
   116→  ): RubyNode {
   117→    const node = new RubyNode()
   118→    node.__reading = json.reading ?? ''
   119→    return node
   120→  }
   121→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode & { reading: string } {
   122→    return {
   123→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   124→      type: 'ruby',
   125→      reading: this.__reading,
   126→      version: 1,
   127→    }
   128→  }
   129→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   130→    return stubDOM()
   131→  }
   132→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   133→    return false
   134→  }
   135→  isInline(): boolean {
   136→    return true
   137→  }
   138→}
   139→
   140→// ── DetailsNode (ElementNode, block) ──
   141→
   142→export class DetailsNode extends ElementNode {
   143→  __summary = ''
   144→  __open = false
   145→
   146→  static getType(): string {
   147→    return 'details'
   148→  }
   149→  static clone(node: DetailsNode): DetailsNode {
   150→    const n = new DetailsNode((node as any).__key)
   151→    n.__summary = node.__summary
   152→    n.__open = node.__open
   153→    return n
   154→  }
   155→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   156→    super(key)
   157→  }
   158→  static importJSON(
   159→    json: SerializedElementNode & { summary?: string; open?: boolean },
   160→  ): DetailsNode {
   161→    const node = new DetailsNode()
   162→    node.__summary = json.summary ?? ''
   163→    node.__open = json.open ?? false
   164→    return node
   165→  }
   166→  exportJSON(): SerializedElementNode & { summary: string; open: boolean } {
   167→    return {
   168→      ...super.exportJSON(),
   169→      type: 'details',
   170→      summary: this.__summary,
   171→      open: this.__open,
   172→    }
   173→  }
   174→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   175→    return stubDOM()
   176→  }
   177→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   178→    return false
   179→  }
   180→}
   181→
   182→// ── Generic headless DecoratorNode ──
   183→
   184→type Props = Record<string, unknown>
   185→
   186→function headlessDecorator(
   187→  type: string,
   188→  propKeys: string[],
   189→  defaults: Props,
   190→  inline = false,
   191→) {
   192→  class Node extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   193→    constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   194→      super(key)
   195→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   196→        ;(this as any)[`__${k}`] = defaults[k]
   197→      }
   198→    }
   199→    static getType(): string {
   200→      return type
   201→    }
   202→    static clone(node: Node): Node {
   203→      const n = new Node((node as any).__key)
   204→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   205→        ;(n as any)[`__${k}`] = (node as any)[`__${k}`]
   206→      }
   207→      return n
   208→    }
   209→    static importJSON(json: SerializedLexicalNode & Props): Node {
   210→      const node = new Node()
   211→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   212→        ;(node as any)[`__${k}`] = json[k] ?? defaults[k]
   213→      }
   214→      return node
   215→    }
   216→    exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode & Props {
   217→      const out: Props = { type, version: 1 }
   218→      for (const k of propKeys) {
   219→        out[k] = (this as any)[`__${k}`]
   220→      }
   221→      return out as SerializedLexicalNode & Props
   222→    }
   223→    createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
   224→      return stubDOM()
   225→    }
   226→    updateDOM(): boolean {
   227→      return false
   228→    }
   229→    decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): null {
   230→      return null
   231→    }
   232→    isInline(): boolean {
   233→      return inline
   234→    }
   235→  }
   236→  return Node as unknown as Klass<LexicalNode>
   237→}
   238→
   239→// ── Simple property-based nodes ──
   240→
   241→export const ImageNode = headlessDecorator(
   242→  'image',
   243→  ['src', 'altText', 'width', 'height', 'caption', 'thumbhash', 'accent'],
   244→  {
   245→    src: '',
   246→    altText: '',
   247→    width: undefined,
   248→    height: undefined,
   249→    caption: undefined,
   250→    thumbhash: undefined,
   251→    accent: undefined,
   252→  },
   253→)
   254→
   255→export const VideoNode = headlessDecorator(
   256→  'video',

   258→  { src: '', poster: undefined, width: undefined, height: undefined },
   259→)
   260→
   261→export const LinkCardNode = headlessDecorator(
   262→  'link-card',
   263→  ['url', 'source', 'id', 'title', 'description', 'favicon', 'image'],
   264→  {
   265→    url: '',
   266→    source: undefined,
   267→    id: undefined,
   268→    title: undefined,
   269→    description: undefined,
   270→    favicon: undefined,
   271→    image: undefined,
   272→  },
   273→)
   274→
   275→export const KaTeXInlineNode = headlessDecorator(
   276→  'katex-inline',
   277→  ['equation'],
   278→  { equation: '' },

   280→)
   281→
   282→export const KaTeXBlockNode = headlessDecorator('katex-block', ['equation'], {

   284→})
   285→
   286→export const MermaidNode = headlessDecorator('mermaid', ['diagram'], {
   287→  diagram: '',
   288→})
   289→
   290→export const MentionNode = headlessDecorator(
   291→  'mention',
   292→  ['platform', 'handle', 'displayName'],
   293→  { platform: '', handle: '', displayName: undefined },
   294→  true,
   295→)
   296→
   297→export const CodeBlockNode = headlessDecorator(
   298→  'code-block',
   299→  ['code', 'language'],
   300→  { code: '', language: '' },
   301→)
   302→
   303→export const FootnoteNode = headlessDecorator(
   304→  'footnote',
   305→  ['identifier'],
   306→  { identifier: '' },
   307→  true,
   308→)
   309→
   310→export const FootnoteSectionNode = headlessDecorator(

   315→
   316→export const EmbedNode = headlessDecorator('embed', ['url', 'source'], {

   321→export const CodeSnippetNode = headlessDecorator('code-snippet', ['files'], {

   333→
   334→// ── Nested content nodes ──
   335→
   336→export class BannerNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   337→  __bannerType = 'note'
   338→  __contentState: unknown = null
   339→
   340→  static getType(): string {
   341→    return 'banner'
   342→  }
   343→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   344→    super(key)
   345→  }
   346→  static clone(node: BannerNode): BannerNode {
   347→    const n = new BannerNode((node as any).__key)
   348→    n.__bannerType = node.__bannerType
   349→    n.__contentState = node.__contentState

   352→  static importJSON(

   355→      content?: unknown
   356→    },
   357→  ): BannerNode {
   358→    const node = new BannerNode()

   360→    node.__contentState = json.content ?? null

   363→  exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode {

   371→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {

   385→export class AlertQuoteNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   386→  __alertType = 'note'
   387→  __contentState: unknown = null
   388→
   389→  static getType(): string {
   390→    return 'alert-quote'
   391→  }
   392→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   393→    super(key)
   394→  }
   395→  static clone(node: AlertQuoteNode): AlertQuoteNode {
   396→    const n = new AlertQuoteNode((node as any).__key)
   397→    n.__alertType = node.__alertType

   404→      content?: unknown
   405→    },
   406→  ): AlertQuoteNode {
   407→    const node = new AlertQuoteNode()
   408→    node.__alertType = json.alertType ?? 'note'
   409→    node.__contentState = json.content ?? null
   410→    return node
   411→  }
   412→  exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode {
   413→    return {
   414→      type: 'alert-quote',
   415→      version: 1,
   416→      alertType: this.__alertType,
   417→      content: this.__contentState,
   418→    } as SerializedLexicalNode
   419→  }
   420→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   421→    return stubDOM()
   422→  }
   423→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   424→    return false
   425→  }
   426→  decorate(): null {
   427→    return null
   428→  }
   429→  getTextContent(): string {
   430→    return extractText(this.__contentState)
   431→  }
   432→}
   433→
   434→export class GridContainerNode extends DecoratorNode<null> {
   435→  __cols = 2
   436→  __gap = '16px'
   437→  __cells: unknown[] = []
   438→
   439→  static getType(): string {
   440→    return 'grid-container'
   441→  }
   442→  constructor(key?: NodeKey) {
   443→    super(key)
   444→  }
   445→  static clone(node: GridContainerNode): GridContainerNode {
   446→    const n = new GridContainerNode((node as any).__key)
   447→    n.__cols = node.__cols
   448→    n.__gap = node.__gap
   449→    n.__cells = node.__cells
   450→    return n
   451→  }
   452→  static importJSON(
   453→    json: SerializedLexicalNode & {
   454→      cols?: number
   455→      gap?: string | number
   456→      cells?: unknown[]
   457→    },
   458→  ): GridContainerNode {
   459→    const node = new GridContainerNode()
   460→    node.__cols = json.cols ?? 2
   461→    const rawGap = json.gap
   462→    node.__gap = typeof rawGap === 'number' ? `${rawGap}px` : (rawGap ?? '16px')
   463→    node.__cells = json.cells ?? []
   464→    return node
   465→  }
   466→  exportJSON(): SerializedLexicalNode {
   467→    return {
   468→      type: 'grid-container',
   469→      version: 1,
   470→      cols: this.__cols,
   471→      gap: this.__gap,
   472→      cells: this.__cells,
   473→    } as SerializedLexicalNode
   474→  }
   475→  createDOM(): HTMLElement {
   476→    return stubDOM()
   477→  }
   478→  updateDOM(): boolean {
   479→    return false
   480→  }
   481→  decorate(): null {
   482→    return null
   483→  }
   484→  getTextContent(): string {
   485→    return this.__cells.map((cell) => extractText(cell)).join('\n')
   486→  }
   487→}
   488→
   489→// ── Aggregate ──
   490→
   491→export const customHeadlessNodes: Klass<LexicalNode>[] = [
   492→  SpoilerNode,
   493→  RubyNode,
   494→  DetailsNode,
   495→  ImageNode,
   496→  VideoNode,
   497→  LinkCardNode,
   498→  KaTeXInlineNode,
   499→  KaTeXBlockNode,
   500→  MermaidNode,
   501→  MentionNode,
   502→  CodeBlockNode,
   503→  FootnoteNode,
   504→  FootnoteSectionNode,
   505→  EmbedNode,
   506→  CodeSnippetNode,
   507→  GalleryNode,
   508→  TldrawNode,
   509→  BannerNode,
   510→  AlertQuoteNode,
   511→  GridContainerNode,
   512→]
   513→
   514→export const allHeadlessNodes: Klass<LexicalNode>[] = [
   515→  ...builtinNodes,
   516→  ...customHeadlessNodes,
   517→]
   518→
   519→// ── Transformers (Lexical → Markdown) ──
   520→
   521→export { $toMarkdown, allHeadlessTransformers } from './transformers'
   522→
```

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     7→  Spread,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    11→import { createElement } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { TldrawSSRRenderer } from './TldrawSSRRenderer'
    14→
    15→export type SerializedTldrawNode = Spread<
    16→  { snapshot: string },
    17→  SerializedLexicalNode
    18→>
    19→
    20→export class TldrawNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    21→  __snapshot: string
    22→
    23→  static getType(): string {
    24→    return 'tldraw'
    25→  }
    26→
    27→  static clone(node: TldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    28→    return new TldrawNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    32→    super(key)
    33→    this.__snapshot = snapshot
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    37→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    38→    div.className = 'rich-tldraw-wrapper'
    39→    return div
    40→  }
    41→
    42→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    43→    return false
    44→  }
    45→
    46→  isInline(): boolean {
    47→    return false
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    51→    return $createTldrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
    52→  }
    53→
    54→  exportJSON(): SerializedTldrawNode {
    55→    return {
    56→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    57→      type: 'tldraw',
    58→      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    59→      version: 1,
    60→    }
    61→  }
    62→
    63→  getSnapshot(): string {
    64→    return this.__snapshot
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  setSnapshot(snapshot: string): void {
    68→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    69→    writable.__snapshot = snapshot
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    73→    return createElement(TldrawSSRRenderer, {
    74→      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    75→    })
    76→  }
    77→}
    78→
    79→export function $createTldrawNode(snapshot: string): TldrawNode {
    80→  return new TldrawNode(snapshot)
    81→}
    82→
    83→export function $isTldrawNode(
    84→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    85→): node is TldrawNode {
    86→  return node instanceof TldrawNode
    87→}
    88→
```

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'

     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    10→
    11→export interface TldrawStaticRendererProps {
    12→  snapshot: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export const TldrawDisplayRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
    16→  snapshot,
    17→}) => {
    18→  const theme = useColorScheme()
    19→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    20→  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    if (hasEnteredView) return
    24→    const target = containerRef.current
    25→    if (!target) return
    26→
    27→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    28→      (entries) => {
    29→        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
    30→          setHasEnteredView(true)
    31→          observer.disconnect()
    32→        }
    33→      },
    34→      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    35→    )
    36→    observer.observe(target)
    37→    return () => observer.disconnect()
    38→  }, [hasEnteredView])
    39→
    40→  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    41→    return (
    42→      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
    43→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
    44→      </div>
    45→    )
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  return (
    49→    <div ref={containerRef}>
    50→      <TldrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    51→    </div>
    52→  )
    53→}
    54→
    55→// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---
    56→
    57→const TldrawExpandContent: FC<{
    58→  dismiss: () => void
    59→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    60→  data: Record<string, any>
    61→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    62→}> = ({ dismiss, TldrawComponent, data, theme }) => (
    63→  <>
    64→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
    65→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Whiteboard</span>
    66→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
    67→      <button type="button" className={css.tldrawHeaderClose} onClick={dismiss}>
    68→        <X size={18} />
    69→      </button>
    70→    </div>
    71→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
    72→      <TldrawComponent
    73→        snapshot={data}
    74→        hideUi
    75→        onMount={(editor: any) => {
    76→          editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
    77→          editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
    78→          editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
    79→          setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
    80→        }}
    81→      />
    82→    </div>
    83→  </>
    84→)
    85→
    86→// --- Main Canvas ---
    87→
    88→const TldrawStaticCanvas: FC<{
    89→  snapshot: string
    90→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    91→}> = ({ snapshot, theme }) => {

   111→  useEffect(() => {

   130→  const handleExpand = useCallback(() => {

   146→    })
   147→  }, [TldrawComponent, data, theme, portalClassName])
   148→
   149→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   150→
   151→  if (loading) {
   152→    return (
   153→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   154→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
   155→      </div>

   158→
   159→  if (dataError || !data) {

   166→
   167→  if (!TldrawComponent) {

   180→      suppressHydrationWarning

   185→        }
   186→      >

   189→
   190→      <div className={css.tldrawActionGroup}>
   191→        <button
   192→          type="button"
   193→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   194→          title="Zoom In"
   195→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomIn()}
   196→        >
   197→          <ZoomIn size={20} />
   198→        </button>
   199→        <button
   200→          type="button"
   201→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   202→          title="Zoom Out"
   203→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomOut()}
   204→        >
   205→          <ZoomOut size={20} />
   206→        </button>
   207→        <button
   208→          type="button"

   210→          title="Fit to Content"
   211→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomToFit()}
   212→        >
   213→          <ScanSearch size={20} />
   214→        </button>
   215→        <button
   216→          type="button"
   217→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   218→          title="Expand"
   219→          onClick={handleExpand}
   220→        >
   221→          <Maximize2 size={20} />
   222→        </button>
   223→      </div>
   224→    </div>
   225→  )
   226→}
   227→
   228→class TldrawErrorBoundary extends Component<
   229→  { fallback: ReactNode; children: ReactNode },
   230→  { hasError: boolean }
   231→> {
   232→  state = { hasError: false }
   233→  static getDerivedStateFromError() {
   234→    return { hasError: true }
   235→  }
   236→  render() {
   237→    return this.state.hasError ? this.props.fallback : this.props.children
   238→  }
   239→}
   240→
```

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog, SegmentedControl } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Clipboard, Download, Pencil, Upload, X } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import type { FC } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
    10→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    11→
    12→export interface TldrawEditRendererProps {
    13→  snapshot: string
    14→  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
    15→}
    16→
    17→const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000
    18→
    19→// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────
    20→
    21→const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
    22→  dismiss: () => void
    23→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    24→  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
    25→  initialSnapshot: string
    26→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    27→  onSave: (ref: string) => void
    28→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
    29→  onClose: (doc?: Record<string, any>) => void
    30→}> = ({
    31→  dismiss,
    32→  TldrawComponent,
    33→  initialData,
    34→  initialSnapshot,
    35→  theme,
    36→  onSave,
    37→  saveSnapshot,
    38→  onClose,
    39→}) => {
    40→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
    41→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
    42→  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    43→  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
    44→  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
    45→  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote'>(() => {
    46→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim())
    47→      return 'inline'
    48→    try {
    49→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    50→      return 'inline'
    51→    } catch {
    52→      return 'remote'
    53→    }
    54→  })
    55→  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
    56→  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    57→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return ''
    58→    try {
    59→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    60→      return ''
    61→    } catch {
    62→      return initialSnapshot
    63→    }
    64→  })
    65→  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
    66→
    67→  useEffect(() => {
    68→    return () => {
    69→      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    70→    }
    71→  }, [])
    72→
    73→  const performSave = useCallback((): Promise<void> => {
    74→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    75→    const editor = editorRef.current
    76→    if (!editor) return Promise.resolve()
    77→    try {
    78→      const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
    79→      if (storageModeRef.current === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
    80→        setIsSaving(true)
    81→        return saveSnapshot(doc).then(
    82→          (ref) => {
    83→            onSave(ref)
    84→            isDirtyRef.current = false
    85→            setIsDirty(false)
    86→            setIsSaving(false)
    87→            setSavedRef(ref)
    88→          },
    89→          () => {
    90→            setIsSaving(false)
    91→          },
    92→        )
    93→      } else {
    94→        onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
    95→        isDirtyRef.current = false
    96→        setIsDirty(false)
    97→      }
    98→    } catch {
    99→      // ignore
   100→    }
   101→    return Promise.resolve()
   102→  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot])
   103→
   104→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   105→    (editor: any) => {
   106→      editorRef.current = editor
   107→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   108→      editor.store.listen(
   109→        () => {
   110→          isDirtyRef.current = true
   111→          setIsDirty(true)
   112→          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   113→          saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(
   114→            () => performSave(),
   115→            SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS,
   116→          )
   117→        },
   118→        { scope: 'document' },
   119→      )
   120→    },
   121→    [theme, performSave],
   122→  )
   123→
   124→  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
   125→    void performSave().then(() => {
   126→      const editor = editorRef.current
   127→      onClose(editor?.store.getSnapshot())
   128→      dismiss()
   129→    })
   130→  }, [performSave, onClose, dismiss])
   131→
   132→  const handleDiscard = useCallback(() => {
   133→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   134→    dismiss()
   135→  }, [dismiss])
   136→
   137→  const showConfirmDialog = useCallback(() => {
   138→    presentDialog({
   139→      title: 'Unsaved Changes',
   140→      description:
   141→        'You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.',
   142→      content: ({ dismiss: dismissConfirm }) => (
   143→        <div className={css.tldrawConfirmActions}>
   144→          <button
   145→            type="button"
   146→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtn}
   147→            onClick={dismissConfirm}
   148→          >
   149→            Continue Editing
   150→          </button>
   151→          <button
   152→            type="button"
   153→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnDanger}
   154→            onClick={() => {
   155→              dismissConfirm()
   156→              handleDiscard()
   157→            }}
   158→          >
   159→            Discard
   160→          </button>
   161→          <button
   162→            type="button"
   163→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnPrimary}
   164→            onClick={() => {
   165→              dismissConfirm()
   166→              handleSaveAndClose()
   167→            }}
   168→          >
   169→            Save & Close
   170→          </button>
   171→        </div>
   172→      ),
   173→      portalClassName,
   174→      theme,
   175→      showCloseButton: false,
   176→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   177→    })
   178→  }, [handleDiscard, handleSaveAndClose, portalClassName, theme])
   179→
   180→  // Intercept ESC in capture phase to prevent Base UI auto-dismiss
   181→  useEffect(() => {
   182→    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   183→      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   184→        e.preventDefault()
   185→        e.stopImmediatePropagation()
   186→        if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   187→          showConfirmDialog()
   188→        } else {
   189→          dismiss()
   190→        }
   191→      }
   192→    }
   193→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   194→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   195→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   196→
   197→  const attemptClose = useCallback(() => {
   198→    if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   199→      showConfirmDialog()
   200→    } else {
   201→      dismiss()
   202→    }
   203→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   204→
   205→  const handleManualUpload = useCallback(() => {
   206→    performSave()
   207→  }, [performSave])
   208→
   209→  const handleExportJson = useCallback(() => {
   210→    const editor = editorRef.current
   211→    if (!editor) return
   212→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   213→    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(doc, null, 2)], {
   214→      type: 'application/json',
   215→    })
   216→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   217→    const a = document.createElement('a')
   218→    a.href = url
   219→    a.download = 'tldraw-snapshot.json'
   220→    a.click()
   221→    URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   222→  }, [])
   223→
   224→  const handleCopyJson = useCallback(() => {
   225→    const editor = editorRef.current
   226→    if (!editor) return
   227→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   228→    void navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(doc))
   229→  }, [])
   230→
   231→  const handleCopyRef = useCallback(() => {
   232→    if (savedRef) void navigator.clipboard.writeText(savedRef)
   233→  }, [savedRef])
   234→
   235→  const handleStorageModeChange = useCallback(
   236→    (newMode: 'inline' | 'remote') => {
   237→      setStorageMode(newMode)
   238→      storageModeRef.current = newMode
   239→      if (newMode === 'inline') setSavedRef('')
   240→      performSave()
   241→    },
   242→    [performSave],
   243→  )
   244→
   245→  return (
   246→    <>
   247→      {/* Header */}
   248→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
   249→        <span
   250→          className={css.tldrawStatusDot}
   251→          style={{ backgroundColor: isDirty ? '#f59e0b' : '#22c55e' }}
   252→        />
   253→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Canvas Editor</span>
   254→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
   255→
   256→        <div className={css.tldrawHeaderActions}>
   257→          {saveSnapshot && (
   258→            <>
   259→              <SegmentedControl
   260→                items={[
   261→                  { value: 'inline', label: 'Inline' },
   262→                  { value: 'remote', label: 'Remote' },
   263→                ]}
   264→                value={storageMode}
   265→                onChange={handleStorageModeChange}
   266→              />
   267→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   268→              <button
   269→                type="button"
   270→                className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   271→                onClick={handleManualUpload}
   272→                disabled={isSaving}
   273→              >
   274→                <Upload size={14} />
   275→                <span>{isSaving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}</span>
   276→              </button>
   277→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   278→            </>
   279→          )}
   280→          <button
   281→            type="button"
   282→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   283→            onClick={handleExportJson}
   284→          >
   285→            <Download size={14} />
   286→            JSON
   287→          </button>
   288→          <button
   289→            type="button"
   290→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   291→            onClick={handleCopyJson}
   292→          >
   293→            <Clipboard size={14} />
   294→            Copy
   295→          </button>
   296→          {storageMode === 'remote' && savedRef && (
   297→            <>
   298→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   299→              <button
   300→                type="button"
   301→                className={css.tldrawActionBarUrl}
   302→                onClick={handleCopyRef}
   303→                title={savedRef}
   304→              >
   305→                {savedRef}
   306→              </button>
   307→            </>
   308→          )}
   309→        </div>
   310→
   311→        <button
   312→          type="button"
   313→          className={css.tldrawHeaderClose}
   314→          onClick={attemptClose}
   315→        >
   316→          <X size={18} />
   317→        </button>
   318→      </div>
   319→
   320→      {/* Canvas */}
   321→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
   322→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={initialData} onMount={handleMount} />
   323→      </div>
   324→    </>
   325→  )
   326→}
   327→
   328→// ── Main component ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   329→
   330→export const TldrawEditRenderer: FC<TldrawEditRendererProps> = ({
   331→  snapshot,
   332→  onSnapshotChange,
   333→}) => {
   334→  const theme = useColorScheme()
   335→  const { saveSnapshot } = useTldrawConfig()
   336→  const {
   337→    snapshot: initialData,
   338→    loading: dataLoading,
   339→    error: dataError,
   340→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
   341→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
   342→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
   343→  const previewEditorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   344→  const initialDataRef = useRef<Record<string, any> | undefined>(undefined)
   345→  const onSnapshotChangeRef = useRef(onSnapshotChange)
   346→  onSnapshotChangeRef.current = onSnapshotChange
   347→  const saveSnapshotRef = useRef(saveSnapshot)
   348→  saveSnapshotRef.current = saveSnapshot
   349→  const snapshotRef = useRef(snapshot)
   350→  snapshotRef.current = snapshot
   351→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   352→
   353→  useEffect(() => {
   354→    if (initialData && !initialDataRef.current) {
   355→      initialDataRef.current = initialData
   356→    }
   357→  }, [initialData])
   358→
   359→  useEffect(() => {
   360→    import('tldraw')
   361→      .then((mod) => {
   362→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   363→        setLibLoading(false)
   364→      })
   365→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   366→  }, [])
   367→
   368→  useEffect(() => {
   369→    if (previewEditorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   370→      previewEditorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({
   371→        colorScheme: theme,
   372→      })
   373→    }
   374→  }, [theme])
   375→
   376→  const handlePreviewMount = useCallback(
   377→    (editor: any) => {
   378→      previewEditorRef.current = editor
   379→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   380→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   381→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   382→      setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
   383→    },
   384→    [theme],
   385→  )
   386→
   387→  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
   388→    if (!TldrawComponent) return
   389→    presentDialog({
   390→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   391→        <TldrawEditorDialogContent
   392→          dismiss={dismiss}
   393→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   394→          initialData={initialDataRef.current}
   395→          initialSnapshot={snapshotRef.current}
   396→          theme={theme}
   397→          onSave={(ref) => onSnapshotChangeRef.current(ref)}
   398→          saveSnapshot={saveSnapshotRef.current}
   399→          onClose={(doc) => {
   400→            if (doc) initialDataRef.current = doc
   401→          }}
   402→        />
   403→      ),
   404→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   405→      portalClassName,
   406→      theme,
   407→      showCloseButton: false,
   408→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   409→    })
   410→  }, [TldrawComponent, theme, portalClassName])
   411→
   412→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   413→
   414→  if (loading || !TldrawComponent) {
   415→    return (
   416→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   417→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw editor...</div>
   418→      </div>
   419→    )
   420→  }
   421→
   422→  if (dataError) {
   423→    return (
   424→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   425→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError}</div>
   426→      </div>
   427→    )
   428→  }
   429→
   430→  return (
   431→    <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   432→      <TldrawComponent
   433→        snapshot={initialDataRef.current}
   434→        hideUi
   435→        onMount={handlePreviewMount}
   436→      />
   437→
   438→      <button
   439→        type="button"
   440→        className={css.tldrawEditOverlay}
   441→        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   442→      >
   443→        <span className={css.tldrawEditLabel}>
   444→          <Pencil size={16} />
   445→          Edit Whiteboard
   446→        </span>
   447→      </button>
   448→    </div>
   449→  )
   450→}
   451→
```
